mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (chat_room_id, sender_email, message_type, message, is_deleted, is_updated, created_at) VALUES (#{chatRoomId}, #{senderEmail}, #{messageType}, #{message}, false, false, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, mf.file_id AS fileId, f.ori_name AS fileName FROM message m LEFT JOIN message_file mf ON m.message_id = mf.message_id LEFT JOIN file f ON mf.file_id = f.file_id WHERE m.message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET message = #{content}, is_updated = true WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
